title: Reina Aharen (Aharen san wa hakarenai)
description: Now you can use Reina Aharen as you totem
body:
🫧 Reina Aharen Totem Resourcepack — *Aharen-san wa Hakarenai Edition*  
Carry quiet unpredictability—replace your Totem of Undying with Reina Aharen from *Aharen-san wa Hakarenai*!  
This resourcepack transforms the vanilla totem into a custom Reina model, perfect for fans of her soft-spoken charm, sudden closeness, and adorable awkwardness.

✨ Features  
✅ Replaces the Totem of Undying with Aharen
🧩 Compatible with vanilla gameplay and datapacks  
🔁 Modular asset structure for easy editing and anime swaps  
🛠️ Works with Minecraft 1.16+
